summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4 bug fixes (P0, P1, P2). All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all new features working correctly.

backend: P0: File download with auth returns 200
P0: File download without auth returns 401/403
P0: Preview returns correct content-type for images
P1: Duplicate detection returns 409 for same file
P1: force_upload=true allows duplicate with is_duplicate=true
P1: queue-analysis endpoint sets pieces to 'queued' status
P1: queue-status endpoint returns all counters (pending, queued, analyzing, complete, error)
P1: delete-many endpoint deletes multiple pieces at once
frontend: P0: FilePreviewModal shows 'Prévisualisation non disponible' for unsupported types
P1: Checkboxes appear on each piece in selection mode
P1: 'Supprimer (N)' button shows count of selected items
P1: 'Doublon' badge visible on duplicate pieces
P2: DateInput text field with JJ/MM/AAAA format
P2: Calendar button opens date picker popover

seed_data_creation: Test dossier 'Test Phase 4' with 2 pieces (one with AI proposal, one marked as duplicate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 bug fixes fully tested. P0 (authenticated file download/preview), P1 (duplicate detection, analysis queue, batch delete, selection mode), P2 (DateInput with calendar year/month selectors) all working. Note: AI analysis fails due to budget exceeded on EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - this is expected and not a bug.

P0_file_preview_auth.details: GET /api/pieces/{id}/preview returns 200 with token, correct content-type

P0_file_preview_modal.details: FilePreviewModal opens, shows content or 'non disponible' message, has download button

P1_duplicate_detection.details: Upload same file returns 409, force_upload=true returns 200 with is_duplicate=true

P1_analysis_queue.details: queue-analysis sets status to 'queued', queue-status returns all counters

P1_batch_delete.details: delete-many endpoint deletes multiple pieces, returns deleted_count

P1_selection_mode.details: Selection button, checkboxes, Tout sélectionner, Désélectionner, Supprimer(N) all working

P2_date_input.details: Text input JJ/MM/AAAA, calendar button, month/year selectors, Date inconnue checkbox
